events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: weep holes missing/blocked at bottom course of masonry flashing & weeps. This is a defect. Work is rough-complete. Need to identify component/condition and defect cues. Decision should be fail because non-compliant. Risk: high? Weep holes missing can trap water, cause masonry deterioration, but not immediately dangerous. Medium-high. I'll say high. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent_complete maybe 85. Value 0. Confidence 0.9. Findings: weep holes missing or blocked at bottom course above flashing; no drainage path for entrapped water. Actions: clear/restore weep holes at required spacing per TMS 402/BIA; verify flashing continuity; re-inspect. References: TMS 402, BIA Tech Note 7.
